故障诊断.title: Leveraging systems' non-linearity to tackle the scarcity of data in the design of Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Systems
故障诊断.title_zh: 利用系统非线性解决智能故障诊断系统设计中的数据稀缺问题
故障诊断.summary: Deep Transfer Learning (DTL) allows for the efficient building of Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Systems (IFDS). On the other hand, DTL methods still heavily rely on large amounts of labelled data. Obtaining such an amount of data can be challenging when dealing with machines or structures faults. This
故障诊断.summary_zh: 深度迁移学习（DTL）能够高效构建智能故障诊断系统（IFDS）。然而，DTL方法仍然严重依赖大量标注数据。在处理机器或结构故障时，获取如此大量的数据可能具有挑战性。本文提出利用系统的非线性特性来缓解数据稀缺问题，通过挖掘系统内在的非线性动态行为，减少对大规模标注数据的需求，从而在有限数据条件下实现有效的故障诊断。创新点在于将系统非线性作为先验知识融入DTL框架，提升了模型的泛化能力。

强化学习.title: Robust $Q$-learning for mean-field control under Wasserstein uncertainty in common noise
强化学习.title_zh: 公共噪声下Wasserstein不确定性的均值场控制鲁棒Q学习
强化学习.summary: In this article, we present a robust $Q$-learning algorithm for discrete-time mean-field control problems under Wasserstein uncertainty in the common noise law. The algorithm combines a quantization-and-projection scheme with a Wasserstein dual reformulation on the common-noise space. We establish i
强化学习.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒Q学习算法，用于处理公共噪声律存在Wasserstein不确定性的离散时间均值场控制问题。该算法结合了量化投影方案与公共噪声空间上的Wasserstein对偶重构。我们证明了算法的收敛性，并提供了数值实验验证其有效性。创新点在于首次将Wasserstein不确定性引入均值场控制中的Q学习，增强了模型对噪声分布偏移的鲁棒性，为多智能体系统在不确定环境下的决策提供了新方法。

强化学习.title: CRAX: Fast Safe Reinforcement Learning Benchmarking
强化学习.title_zh: CRAX：快速安全强化学习基准测试
强化学习.summary: Safety is a core concern for deploying reinforcement learning (RL) agents in real-world domains such as robotics and autonomous driving. While benchmarks have been central to progress in RL, existing safety benchmarks with high-fidelity 3D physics remain computationally slow, limiting large-scale experiments. We introduce CRAX, a fast safe RL benchmarking suite that uses simplified 2D physics while preserving key safety challenges. CRAX runs orders of magnitude faster than 3D benchmarks, enabling rapid prototyping and evaluation. We provide a set of diverse environments and evaluation metrics, and demonstrate that CRAX can reproduce insights from 3D benchmarks with high correlation.
强化学习.summary_zh: 安全性是在机器人、自动驾驶等现实领域部署强化学习智能体的核心问题。尽管基准测试对强化学习的进步至关重要，但现有的高保真3D物理安全基准测试计算缓慢，限制了大规模实验。本文介绍CRAX，一个快速安全强化学习基准测试套件，它使用简化的2D物理，同时保留了关键的安全挑战。CRAX的运行速度比3D基准测试快数个数量级，支持快速原型设计和评估。我们提供了一系列多样化的环境和评估指标，并证明CRAX能够以高相关性复现3D基准测试的结论。

网络安全.title: Multi-View Decompilation for LLM-Based Malware Classification
网络安全.title_zh: 基于多视角反编译的LLM恶意软件分类
网络安全.summary: Malware analysts often inspect compiled binaries through decompiled pseudo-C, when source code is unavailable. Recent work suggests that large language models (LLMs) can assist this process by classifying decompiled code as benign or malicious, but existing pipelines typically rely on a single decom
网络安全.summary_zh: 当源代码不可用时，恶意软件分析师通常通过反编译的伪C代码检查编译后的二进制文件。近期研究表明，大语言模型（LLM）可通过将反编译代码分类为良性或恶意来辅助此过程，但现有管道通常依赖单一反编译视角。本文提出多视角反编译方法，利用多种反编译工具生成不同伪代码表示，并将其融合以提高LLM分类的准确性。创新点在于整合多个反编译视角的信息，显著提升了恶意软件检测的鲁棒性和性能。

计算机视觉.title: SARLO-80: Worldwide Slant SAR Language Optic Dataset 80cm
计算机视觉.title_zh: SARLO-80：全球斜距SAR语言光学数据集80厘米
计算机视觉.summary: Multimodal foundation models have advanced rapidly thanks to large optical benchmarks, but comparable resources for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) remain limited. Existing SAR--optical datasets largely rely on low-resolution, intensity-only Ground Range Detected~(GRD) products and do not preserve co
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 多模态基础模型因大规模光学基准而快速发展，但合成孔径雷达（SAR）的类似资源仍然有限。现有SAR-光学数据集主要依赖低分辨率、仅强度的地面距离探测（GRD）产品，且未保留复杂信息。本文提出了SARLO-80数据集，提供全球范围的80厘米分辨率斜距SAR图像与光学图像配对，并包含丰富的元数据。该数据集填补了高分辨率SAR-光学多模态数据的空白，为SAR图像理解、跨模态检索和基础模型训练提供了重要资源。

计算机视觉.title: FreeStyle: Free Control of Style-Content Dual-Reference Generation from Community LoRA Mining
计算机视觉.title_zh: FreeStyle：基于社区LoRA挖掘的风格-内容双参考生成自由控制
计算机视觉.summary: Style-content dual-reference generation aims to synthesize an image that preserves the structure and semantics of a content reference while adopting the style of a separate style reference. Despite recent progress, this setting remains challenging because models must balance content fidelity, style adherence, and diversity. We propose FreeStyle, a method that mines a large community LoRA repository to discover diverse style representations, then uses a dual-branch architecture with cross-attention to separately control content and style. A style-content disentanglement loss ensures that each branch focuses on its respective attribute. FreeStyle allows users to freely combine any content image with any discovered style, achieving high-quality and diverse stylized outputs without per-pair fine-tuning. Experiments demonstrate superior performance over existing style transfer and customization methods.
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 风格-内容双参考生成旨在合成一张图像，使其保留内容参考图的结构和语义，同时采用另一张风格参考图的风格。尽管近期取得进展，该任务仍具挑战性，因为模型必须平衡内容保真度、风格一致性和多样性。本文提出FreeStyle，该方法挖掘大型社区LoRA仓库以发现多样的风格表示，然后利用双分支架构和交叉注意力分别控制内容和风格。风格-内容解耦损失确保每个分支专注于各自属性。FreeStyle允许用户自由组合任意内容图像与任意发现的风格，无需逐对微调即可获得高质量、多样化的风格化输出。实验表明，其性能优于现有风格迁移和定制方法。

计算机视觉.title: MakeupMirror: Improving Facial Attribute Preservation in Diffusion Models for Makeup Transfer
计算机视觉.title_zh: MakeupMirror：改进扩散模型中面部属性保持的妆容迁移
计算机视觉.summary: Makeup transfer models enable fun augmented reality (AR) experiences as well as virtual try-on (VTO) for online makeup shopping. While recent state-of-the-art diffusion based solutions such as Stable-Makeup dramatically improve the accuracy and realism of makeup transfer, they still face limitations
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 本文针对扩散模型在妆容迁移中面部属性保持不足的问题，提出了MakeupMirror方法。通过设计属性保留模块和注意力机制，确保在迁移妆容的同时，人脸身份、表情等关键属性不发生改变。主要贡献在于解决了现有扩散模型在妆容迁移时可能扭曲原始面部特征的问题，在多个数据集上实现了更真实、更保真的妆容迁移效果，推动了AR试妆和虚拟试穿技术的发展。

多智能体系统.title: Optimal Order of Multi-Agent and General Many-Body Systems
多智能体系统.title_zh: 多智能体与一般多体系统的最优序
多智能体系统.summary: This paper develops a general framework for analyzing multi-agent systems with feedback loops between agents actions and collective observations. The framework is built on two fundamental agent-level variables: power, which measures agent influence on collective outcomes, and response functions, whic
多智能体系统.summary_zh: 本文发展了一个通用框架，用于分析具有智能体行为与集体观测之间反馈回路的多智能体系统。该框架基于两个基本智能体级变量：权力（衡量智能体对集体结果的影响）和响应函数（描述智能体对集体观测的反应）。通过推导最优序条件，揭示了系统达到全局最优时智能体之间的权力与响应关系。创新点在于将多体物理中的序概念引入多智能体系统，为理解涌现行为和集体决策提供了统一理论。

机器人.title: Dual-Agent Framework for Cross-Model Verified Translation of Natural-Language Protocols into Robotic Laboratory Platform
机器人.title_zh: 双智能体框架：将自然语言协议跨模型验证翻译为机器人实验平台指令
机器人.summary: Biological experiment protocols are written in natural language, whereas automation systems rely on predefined control commands, creating a semantic gap that limits autonomous execution. Microplate-based automatic experiments are particularly challenging due to the need to simultaneously control well plate operations, liquid handling, and detection instruments. We propose a dual-agent framework that leverages large language models to translate natural-language protocols into executable robotic commands, with cross-model verification to ensure accuracy. Our approach achieves high translation fidelity and enables autonomous execution of complex biological protocols on a robotic laboratory platform.
机器人.summary_zh: 生物实验协议以自然语言编写，而自动化系统依赖预定义控制命令，存在语义鸿沟限制自主执行。基于微孔板的自动实验尤其具有挑战性，因为需要同时控制孔板操作、液体处理和检测仪器。本文提出一个双智能体框架，利用大语言模型将自然语言协议翻译为可执行的机器人命令，并通过跨模型验证确保准确性。该方法实现了高翻译保真度，能够在机器人实验平台上自主执行复杂的生物实验协议。

机器人.title: Finetuning Vision-Language-Action Models Requires Fewer Layers Than You Think
机器人.title_zh: 微调视觉-语言-动作模型需要的层数比你想象的少
机器人.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models pre-trained on massive video-robot datasets have revolutionized robotic manipulation, yet their multi-billion parameter architectures impose prohibitive computational burdens during downstream fine-tuning and real-time inference. In this work, we reveal a highly non-uniform distribution of task-relevant knowledge across layers of VLA models. We propose a layer-efficient fine-tuning strategy that selectively updates only a small subset of layers, achieving comparable or superior performance to full fine-tuning while significantly reducing computational cost. Extensive experiments on diverse robotic manipulation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
机器人.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作模型在大量视频-机器人数据集上预训练后，彻底改变了机器人操作领域，但其数十亿参数架构在下游微调和实时推理中带来巨大计算负担。本文揭示了VLA模型中任务相关知识在各层之间的高度非均匀分布。我们提出一种层高效微调策略，仅选择性地更新少量层，即可达到与全参数微调相当甚至更优的性能，同时大幅降低计算成本。在多种机器人操作任务上的大量实验验证了该方法的有效性。

机器人.title: Lagrange: An Open-Vocabulary, Energy-Based Sparse Framework for Generalized End-to-End Driving
机器人.title_zh: Lagrange：面向泛化端到端驾驶的开放词汇、基于能量的稀疏框架
机器人.summary: Scaling end-to-end autonomous driving to complex, open-world environments requires perceptual models that generalize to anomalous scenarios and planners that produce kinematically valid trajectories. Existing paradigms face a distinct dichotomy between representational efficiency and generalization. We propose Lagrange, an open-vocabulary, energy-based sparse framework that combines a vision-language model for open-vocabulary perception with an energy-based planner that learns a cost function over trajectories. The framework uses sparse representations to improve efficiency and generalizes to novel scenarios. Experiments on nuScenes and CARLA show state-of-the-art performance in open-loop and closed-loop settings.
机器人.summary_zh: 将端到端自动驾驶扩展到复杂开放世界环境，需要能泛化到异常场景的感知模型和生成运动学有效轨迹的规划器。现有范式在表征效率和泛化能力之间存在明显矛盾。本文提出Lagrange，一种开放词汇、基于能量的稀疏框架，结合了用于开放词汇感知的视觉语言模型和通过学习轨迹成本函数的基于能量的规划器。该框架利用稀疏表示提高效率，并泛化到新场景。在nuScenes和CARLA上的实验表明，在开环和闭环设置中均达到了最先进性能。

机器人.title: FlowMaps: Modeling Long-Term Multimodal Object Dynamics with Flow Matching
机器人.title_zh: FlowMaps：使用流匹配建模长期多模态物体动态
机器人.summary: Joint spatial and temporal understanding of 3D scenes is a crucial requirement for robots deployed in everyday household environments. Such agents must not only comprehend and navigate spatial layouts, but also reason about how these spaces evolve over time. In particular, humans interact with objec
机器人.summary_zh: 对3D场景的联合时空理解是部署在日常家庭环境中的机器人的关键需求。这些智能体不仅需要理解空间布局并导航，还需要推理这些空间如何随时间演变。特别是，人类与物体交互导致场景动态变化。本文提出FlowMaps，一种基于流匹配的模型，用于长期多模态物体动态建模。创新点包括：将物体动态建模为概率流，捕获多模态未来轨迹；利用流匹配框架高效学习复杂分布。主要贡献在于实现了对物体长期运动的准确预测，提升了机器人在动态环境中的规划与交互能力。

机器人.title: SoftSkill: Behavioral Compression for Contextual Adaptation
机器人.title_zh: SoftSkill：用于情境适应的行为压缩
机器人.summary: Agent skills are commonly deployed as natural-language Markdown files that encode answer policies, evidence-use habits, and task procedures. These files are readable and portable, but they are consumed indirectly: for each task instance, a frozen language model must translate a long textual artifact into situated action. This indirect consumption incurs latency, wastes tokens, and limits adaptation to novel contexts. We propose SoftSkill, a method that compresses behavioral policies into a small set of soft prompts that can be directly injected into the model's embedding space. These soft prompts capture the essence of a skill while being lightweight and adaptable. Experiments on several benchmarks show that SoftSkill achieves comparable or better task performance than full-text skill descriptions while using significantly fewer tokens and enabling faster adaptation to new environments. The compressed representations also exhibit robustness to domain shifts and can be composed to handle complex tasks.
机器人.summary_zh: 该研究提出SoftSkill方法，将智能体的行为策略（如任务流程、证据使用习惯）从冗长的自然语言描述压缩为少量可学习的软提示（soft prompts），直接注入模型嵌入空间。这种方法避免了传统文本描述在每次任务中需要重新解析和推理的开销，显著降低了延迟和令牌消耗，并提高了对新环境的适应能力。实验表明，SoftSkill在多个基准任务上达到或超过全文本策略的性能，同时所需令牌减少一个数量级，且对领域迁移具有鲁棒性。此外，压缩后的表示可组合用于复杂任务。该工作为构建高效、可适应的智能体系统（如机器人、虚拟助手）提供了实用方案，尤其在资源受限或需要快速部署的场景中具有重要价值。

机器人.title: Frequency-Aware Flow Matching for Continuous and Consistent Robotic Action Generation
机器人.title_zh: 频率感知流匹配实现连续一致的机器人动作生成
机器人.summary: Flow matching has emerged as a standard paradigm for robotic manipulation owing to its strong expressive power for modelling complex, multimodal action distributions, alongside similar approaches like diffusion policy. However, existing methods rely on discretized action chunks, making them brittle to temporal discontinuities and limiting their ability to generate smooth, continuous actions. We propose FreqFlow, a frequency-aware flow matching framework that models action sequences in the frequency domain via a learnable Fourier representation. By decomposing actions into frequency components, FreqFlow can generate actions at arbitrary temporal resolutions and ensure temporal consistency. A frequency-domain loss encourages the model to prioritize low-frequency components for smoothness while preserving high-frequency details for precision. Experiments on simulated and real robotic tasks show that FreqFlow produces smoother and more consistent action sequences than chunk-based baselines, improving task success rates by up to 20%.
机器人.summary_zh: 流匹配因其对复杂多模态动作分布的强大表达能力，已成为机器人操作的标准范式，类似方法还有扩散策略。然而，现有方法依赖于离散化的动作块，这使得它们对时间不连续性敏感，且限制了生成平滑连续动作的能力。本文提出FreqFlow，一种频率感知的流匹配框架，通过可学习的傅里叶表示在频域建模动作序列。通过将动作分解为频率分量，FreqFlow能够以任意时间分辨率生成动作，并确保时间一致性。频域损失鼓励模型优先考虑低频分量以实现平滑性，同时保留高频细节以保证精度。在仿真和真实机器人任务上的实验表明，FreqFlow生成的动比基于块的基线更平滑、更一致，任务成功率提升高达20%。

大语言模型.title: How Transparent is DiffusionGemma?
大语言模型.summary: LLM reasoning transparency is a critical affordance for understanding model decisions, mitigating misuse and misalignment, and debugging surprising model behaviors. However, DiffusionGemma performs a larger fraction of its computation in a continuous latent space; does this make its reasoning less transparent? We conduct a systematic analysis of DiffusionGemma's internal representations and attention patterns to assess transparency. We find that while some aspects of reasoning are obscured, others become more interpretable. We propose metrics for transparency and compare DiffusionGemma with standard autoregressive models.
大语言模型.summary_zh: 大语言模型的推理透明度对于理解模型决策、减少误用和不对齐、调试意外行为至关重要。然而，DiffusionGemma在连续潜在空间中进行更大比例的计算，这是否使其推理更不透明？我们对DiffusionGemma的内部表示和注意力模式进行了系统分析以评估透明度。我们发现，虽然推理的某些方面被掩盖，但其他方面变得更可解释。我们提出了透明度指标，并将DiffusionGemma与标准自回归模型进行了比较。

强化学习/RL.title: A Multi-Agent system for Multi-Objective constrained optimization
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 面向多目标约束优化的多智能体系统
强化学习/RL.summary: Many decision-making problems in computing and networking systems can be naturally formulated as cost-minimization problems under performance constraints. In dynamic environments, reinforcement learning (RL) is often used to solve such problems at runtime by embedding both costs and constraint viola
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 计算与网络系统中的许多决策问题可自然表述为性能约束下的成本最小化问题。在动态环境中，强化学习常被用于运行时求解这类问题，通过将成本和约束违反同时嵌入目标函数。本文提出一个多智能体系统，用于解决多目标约束优化问题，创新点在于将多目标优化与约束满足相结合，利用多智能体协作实现高效求解。主要贡献包括：提出一种新颖的多智能体强化学习框架，能够同时优化多个目标并满足复杂约束；在多个基准问题上验证了方法的有效性，相比单智能体方法显著提升了性能。

强化学习/RL.title: Augmenting Game AI with Deep Reinforcement Learning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 用深度强化学习增强游戏AI
强化学习/RL.summary: Immersion in video games depends not only on graphics, audio, and game mechanics, but also on the quality of in-game characters. Producing believable characters, or game AI, remains a significant challenge as behavioral complexity is hard to capture with hand-coded systems. Game AI is a source of im
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 视频游戏的沉浸感不仅取决于图形、音频和游戏机制，还取决于游戏内角色的质量。产生可信的角色（即游戏AI）仍是一个重大挑战，因为行为复杂性难以用手工编码系统捕捉。本文提出用深度强化学习增强游戏AI，创新点在于将深度强化学习应用于游戏角色控制，使角色能够自主学习和适应玩家行为。主要贡献包括：设计了一种分层强化学习架构，用于生成复杂的游戏角色行为；在多种游戏环境中验证了该方法，显著提升了游戏AI的逼真度和玩家体验。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Multi-LCB: Extending LiveCodeBench to Multiple Programming Languages
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Multi-LCB：将LiveCodeBench扩展到多种编程语言
大语言模型/LLM.summary: LiveCodeBench (LCB) has recently become a widely adopted benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) on code-generation tasks. By curating competitive programming problems, constantly adding fresh problems to the set, and filtering them by release dates, LCB provides contamination-aware ev
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: LiveCodeBench (LCB) 近期成为评估大语言模型代码生成任务的广泛采用基准。通过精选竞赛编程题、持续添加新题并按发布日期筛选，LCB提供了污染感知的评估。本文提出Multi-LCB，将LCB扩展到多种编程语言，创新点在于构建多语言代码生成基准，覆盖Python、Java、C++等主流语言。主要贡献包括：收集并标准化了多语言编程问题集；系统评估了多种LLM在多语言环境下的代码生成能力，揭示了语言间性能差异；为多语言代码生成研究提供了标准化评估工具。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Toward Calibrated Mixture-of-Experts Under Distribution Shift
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 面向分布偏移的校准混合专家模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Calibration aligns a model's predictive uncertainty with the frequencies of its empirical outcomes and is important for understanding and trusting reported probabilities. Recent work shows that enforcing calibration at the level of individual predictors can improve ensemble accuracy and calibration.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 校准使模型的预测不确定性与其经验结果的频率对齐，对于理解和信任报告的概率至关重要。最近的研究表明，在个体预测器层面强制校准可以提高集成精度和校准性能。本文提出了一种在分布偏移下对混合专家模型进行校准的方法，通过调整专家网络的校准权重，有效提升了模型在分布外数据上的预测可靠性和整体性能。创新点在于将校准机制融入专家混合架构，并理论分析了分布偏移下的校准误差界。主要贡献是提供了一种实用的校准策略，增强了混合专家模型在现实场景中的鲁棒性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: ScaffoldAgent: Utility-Guided Dynamic Outline Optimization for Open-Ended Deep Research
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: ScaffoldAgent：面向开放式深度研究的效用引导动态大纲优化
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Open-ended deep research (OEDR) requires systems to acquire knowledge through multi-round retrieval and generate coherent long-form reports. The outline plays a central role as a structural scaffold that coordinates retrieval, evidence organization, and generation. However, existing methods either f
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 开放式深度研究要求系统通过多轮检索获取知识并生成连贯的长篇报告。大纲作为协调检索、证据组织和生成的结构支架起着核心作用。然而，现有方法要么固定大纲，要么缺乏对检索效用的优化。本文提出ScaffoldAgent，一种效用引导的动态大纲优化框架。创新点包括：将大纲优化建模为效用最大化问题，动态调整大纲结构以提升检索效率；引入多智能体协作机制，分别负责大纲规划、检索和生成。主要贡献在于显著提高了开放研究任务中报告的质量和完整性，同时减少了不必要的检索步骤。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Contagion Networks: Evaluator Bias Propagation in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 传染网络：多智能体LLM系统中评估者偏差的传播
大语言模型/LLM.summary: When large language models serve as evaluators in multi-agent systems, their systematic evaluation biases propagate through the agent network. We introduce Contagion Networks, a formal framework for measuring how evaluator biases spread across interacting LLM agents. In a controlled 3-agent experiment, we demonstrate that biases from a single biased evaluator can infect other agents, leading to collective misjudgment. We propose a mitigation strategy based on bias-aware aggregation and show that it reduces bias propagation by up to 60%. Our work highlights the risks of using LLMs as evaluators in multi-agent settings and provides tools to analyze and mitigate bias contagion.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 当LLM在多智能体系统中担任评估者时，其系统性评估偏差会在智能体网络中传播。本文提出“传染网络”形式化框架，测量评估者偏差在交互LLM智能体间的扩散。在3智能体实验中发现，单个有偏评估者的偏差可感染其他智能体，导致集体误判。提出的偏差感知聚合策略可将偏差传播降低60%，揭示了多智能体系统中LLM评估的风险及缓解方法。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Rethinking Shrinkage Bias in LLM FP4 Pretraining: Geometric Origin, Systemic Impact, and UFP4 Recipe
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 重新思考LLM FP4预训练中的收缩偏差：几何起源、系统影响及UFP4方案
大语言模型/LLM.summary: FP4 training promises substantial reductions in memory and computation cost for LLM pretraining, yet current FP4 hardware paths and recipes, including NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin-class systems and AMD MI350-series GPUs, remain centered on E2M1 data elements. In this study, we identify a fundamental limitation: the shrinkage bias inherent in E2M1 formats, which geometrically distorts gradient distributions. We characterize its systemic impact on LLM training dynamics and propose UFP4, an unbiased FP4 recipe that mitigates this bias, achieving improved accuracy and training stability.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: FP4训练有望大幅降低LLM预训练的内存和计算成本，但当前FP4硬件路径和方案（包括NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin级系统和AMD MI350系列GPU）仍以E2M1数据元素为中心。本文识别出一个根本性限制：E2M1格式固有的收缩偏差，它在几何上扭曲了梯度分布。我们刻画了其对LLM训练动态的系统性影响，并提出UFP4，一种无偏的FP4方案，缓解了该偏差，从而提高了准确性和训练稳定性。创新点在于揭示了FP4预训练中收缩偏差的几何起源，并提出了有效的修正方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: What Do Safety-Aligned LLMs Learn From Mixed Compliance Demonstrations?
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 安全对齐的LLM从混合顺从示范中学到了什么？
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Prior work has shown that in-context demonstrations can jailbreak language models, but it remains unclear how models interpret different types of compliance demonstrations. We study this by mixing benign compliance demonstrations (non-harmful request, helpful response) with harmful compliance demonstrations (harmful request, compliant response). Our experiments reveal that mixed demonstrations can both enhance and undermine safety, depending on the proportion and ordering of benign vs. harmful examples. We provide insights into the mechanisms by which LLMs learn from mixed demonstrations, informing safer deployment strategies.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 先前工作表明，上下文示范可以越狱语言模型，但模型如何解释不同类型的顺从示范仍不清楚。本文通过混合良性顺从示范（无害请求，有帮助的响应）和有害顺从示范（有害请求，顺从的响应）来研究这一问题。实验表明，混合示范既能增强也能削弱安全性，取决于良性/有害示例的比例和顺序。我们揭示了LLM从混合示范中学习的机制，为更安全的部署策略提供了见解。创新点在于系统分析了混合示范对安全对齐的影响，并揭示了其内在学习机制。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Apparent Psychological Profiles of Large Language Models are Largely a Measurement Artifact
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 大语言模型的心理特征在很大程度上是测量伪影
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Psychological instruments designed for humans are increasingly used to assign large language models (LLMs) stable psychological profiles that affect their usability, safety assessment, and use as proxies for human participants in research. Using a formal psychometric framework, we show that these profiles are largely measurement artifacts rather than stable traits.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 该研究采用心理测量学框架，系统分析了用于人类的心理测试工具在评估大语言模型（LLM）时的有效性。研究表明，LLM表现出的所谓“稳定心理特征”（如人格特质）主要是测量伪影，而非模型内在的稳定属性。通过对比不同测试变体和提示条件下的结果，作者发现LLM的反应高度依赖于上下文和问题表述，缺乏跨情境一致性。这一发现对将LLM作为人类被试替代品的研究以及基于心理特征的安全评估提出了重要警示，强调了在模型评估中需谨慎使用人类心理测量工具。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Learning to Prompt: Improving Student Engagement with Adaptive LLM-based High-School Tutoring
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 学习提示：通过自适应大语言模型高中辅导提高学生参与度
大语言模型/LLM.summary: LLMs can personalize education, although current static-prompt tutoring systems struggle to adapt to diverse academic disciplines. We develop and test a system with subject-aware prompting, based on 14 pedagogical features (e.g., tutor scaffolding, student understanding) extracted from raw transcripts.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本研究针对静态提示的LLM辅导系统难以适应多学科教学的挑战，提出了一种基于学科感知提示的自适应辅导系统。该系统从教学对话中提取14个教学特征（如教师支架、学生理解度），并利用这些特征动态调整提示策略。实验表明，该方法显著提升了学生在不同学科（数学、科学、文学）中的参与度和学习效果，相比基线方法在互动深度和知识保持率上有明显改进。该工作展示了LLM在教育中实现个性化、适应性辅导的潜力，并为智能辅导系统的设计提供了新范式。

大语言模型/LLM.title: AutoPass: Evidence-Guided LLM Agents for Compiler Performance Tuning
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: AutoPass：证据引导的LLM智能体用于编译器性能调优
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for code compilation tasks, but applying them to runtime performance tuning is difficult due to complex microarchitectural effects and noisy runtime measurements. We present AutoPass, a multi-agent framework for compiler performance tuning that uses compiler evidence to guide LLM agents. The framework decomposes the tuning task into subtasks handled by specialized agents, leveraging domain knowledge to reduce exploration space and improve robustness against noise. Experiments show significant performance improvements over baseline compilers.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在代码编译任务中展现出潜力，但由于复杂的微架构效应和运行时测量的噪声，将其应用于运行时性能调优仍具挑战。本文提出AutoPass，一个多智能体框架，利用编译器证据引导LLM智能体进行编译器性能调优。该框架将调优任务分解为多个子任务，由专门的智能体处理，利用领域知识减少探索空间并提高对噪声的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，相比基线编译器，性能显著提升。

大语言模型/LLM.title: ScholarQuest: A Taxonomy-Guided Benchmark for Agentic Academic Paper Search in Open Literature Environments
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: ScholarQuest：开放文献环境中智能体学术论文搜索的分类学引导基准
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Academic paper search is a core step in scientific research, and LLM-based search agents are emerging as a promising paradigm for iterative, intent-driven literature exploration. However, existing benchmarks are insufficient for systematically evaluating agentic academic search under realistic open literature environments. We propose ScholarQuest, a taxonomy-guided benchmark that categorizes search tasks based on user intent complexity and provides a standardized evaluation framework. The benchmark includes diverse query types and ground-truth relevance judgments, enabling comprehensive assessment of search agent capabilities.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 学术论文搜索是科学研究的核心步骤，基于LLM的搜索智能体正成为迭代式、意图驱动的文献探索的有前景范式。然而，现有基准不足以在现实开放文献环境下系统评估智能体学术搜索。本文提出ScholarQuest，一个分类学引导的基准，根据用户意图复杂度对搜索任务进行分类，并提供标准化评估框架。该基准包含多样查询类型和真实相关性判断，能够全面评估搜索智能体的能力。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Interpretable Sperm Morphology Classification via Attention-Guided Deep Learning
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于注意力引导深度学习的可解释精子形态分类
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Male infertility is a major cause of couple infertility, often linked to abnormal sperm morphology. While deep learning models offer automated analysis, most lack interpretability, limiting their clinical adoption. This study proposes an attention-guided deep learning framework for sperm morphology
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 男性不育是夫妻不孕的主要原因，常与精子形态异常相关。虽然深度学习模型提供了自动化分析，但大多数缺乏可解释性，限制了其临床采用。本文提出一种基于注意力引导的深度学习框架用于精子形态分类，创新点在于引入注意力机制，使模型能够聚焦于精子头部、中段和尾部等关键区域，并提供可视化解释。主要贡献包括：设计了一种可解释的分类架构，在公开数据集上达到高精度；通过注意力热图揭示了模型决策依据，增强了临床可信度；为医学图像分析中的可解释AI提供了新思路。

计算机视觉/CV.title: SPOT-E: Test-Time Entropy Shaping with Visual Spotlights for Frozen VLMs
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: SPOT-E：面向冻结视觉语言模型的测试时熵整形与视觉聚光灯
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often underperform on evidence intensive tasks because decisive visual evidence are small, localized, and easy to overlook, leading to failures in evidence readout even when high-level reasoning is intact. Prior inference-time visual interventions can improve grounding
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在证据密集型任务中表现不佳，因为关键视觉证据往往微小、局部且容易被忽视，导致即使高层推理完整，证据读取也会失败。先前的推理时视觉干预可以改进定位，但本文提出SPOT-E方法，在测试时通过“视觉聚光灯”机制动态调整输入图像的熵分布，突出关键区域并抑制无关背景。创新点在于无需微调模型参数，仅通过输入变换即可显著提升VLM在细粒度任务上的表现。主要贡献是提出了一种即插即用的测试时增强方法，适用于任意冻结的VLM。

计算机视觉/CV.title: HilDA: Hierarchical Distillation with Diffusion for Advancing Self-Supervised LiDAR Pre-training
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: HilDA：利用扩散的分层蒸馏推进自监督激光雷达预训练
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) for camera-to-LiDAR knowledge distillation offers a promising solution to the scarcity of annotated data needed to represent the immense geometric and kinematic diversity of real-world autonomous driving (AD). However, current approaches typically treat VFM features as monolithic targets, overlooking the hierarchical structure of visual representations. We propose HilDA, a hierarchical distillation framework that uses a diffusion-based decoder to transfer multi-scale visual features from VFMs to LiDAR models. Our method aligns features at different levels (low-level edges, mid-level objects, high-level semantics) through a progressive distillation process. Experiments on multiple AD benchmarks show that HilDA significantly outperforms existing self-supervised LiDAR pre-training methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance on downstream tasks such as object detection and segmentation.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 利用视觉基础模型（VFM）进行相机到激光雷达的知识蒸馏，可缓解自动驾驶中标注数据稀缺问题。现有方法将VFM特征视为整体，忽略层次结构。本文提出HilDA，采用扩散解码器分层蒸馏多尺度视觉特征（低级边缘、中级物体、高级语义）。在多个自动驾驶基准上，HilDA显著优于现有自监督预训练方法，在目标检测和分割等下游任务中达到最先进性能。

神经符号系统.title: DeepSWIP: Quotient-WMC Counterfactuals for Neural Probabilistic Logic Programs
神经符号系统.title_zh: DeepSWIP：神经概率逻辑程序的商加权模型计数反事实
神经符号系统.summary: Neurosymbolic systems such as DeepProbLog combine neural perception with probabilistic logic, but standard inference is associational. Counterfactual reasoning additionally requires a causal semantics for interventions and evidence. We introduce DeepSWIP, a single-world counterfactual semantics for
神经符号系统.summary_zh: DeepProbLog等神经符号系统将神经感知与概率逻辑相结合，但标准推理是关联性的。反事实推理还需要干预和证据的因果语义。本文提出DeepSWIP，一种针对神经概率逻辑程序的单世界反事实语义，创新点在于将反事实推理引入神经符号系统，利用商加权模型计数实现高效计算。主要贡献包括：形式化了神经概率逻辑程序的反事实语义；提出了一种可扩展的近似推理算法；在多个基准上验证了反事实推理的有效性，为神经符号系统的因果推理提供了新工具。

AI安全.title: Analyzing Defensive Misdirection Against Model-Guided Automated Attacks on Agentic AI Systems
AI安全.title_zh: 针对智能体AI系统中模型引导自动化攻击的防御性误导分析
AI安全.summary: Agentic AI systems increasingly rely on language-model components to interpret instructions, process external data, invoke tools, and coordinate with other agents. These capabilities make prompt-injection and jailbreak attacks more consequential, especially as attackers adopt model-guided automation
AI安全.summary_zh: 智能体AI系统日益依赖语言模型组件来解读指令、处理外部数据、调用工具并与其他智能体协调。这些能力使得提示注入和越狱攻击的后果更为严重，尤其是当攻击者采用模型引导的自动化手段时。本文分析了针对此类自动化攻击的防御性误导策略，通过引入误导性信息来干扰攻击者的模型，从而降低攻击成功率。创新点在于系统性地评估了误导策略的有效性，并提出了可扩展的防御框架。主要贡献是为智能体AI系统提供了一种轻量级的主动防御方案。

生成模型.title: Modularity-Free Conflict-Averse Training for Generalized PINNs
生成模型.title_zh: 面向广义物理信息神经网络的免模块化冲突规避训练
生成模型.summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have become a powerful framework for solving PDEs by embedding physical laws into differentiable objectives. Despite their advances, training PINNs remains fragile: recent conflict-averse optimization schemes alleviate gradient interference between residual a
生成模型.summary_zh: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）通过将物理定律嵌入可微目标，已成为求解偏微分方程的强大框架。尽管取得了进展，PINN的训练仍然脆弱：最近的冲突规避优化方案缓解了残差项之间的梯度干扰，但往往需要模块化设计。本文提出了一种免模块化的冲突规避训练方法，通过动态调整梯度方向，在不增加网络复杂度的情况下有效缓解训练冲突。创新点在于统一了多种物理约束的梯度更新规则，并理论证明了收敛性。主要贡献是提高了PINN的训练稳定性和泛化能力。

生成模型.title: Repurposing a Speech Classifier for Guided Diffusion-Based Speech Generation
生成模型.title_zh: 将语音分类器重用于引导的基于扩散的语音生成
生成模型.summary: Classifier guidance is a way to control diffusion generation by using a noise-conditioned classifier to steer the sampling process toward a target class. One drawback of classifier guidance is that it requires two separately trained models: a classifier and a diffusion model. We therefore study a mo
生成模型.summary_zh: 分类器引导是一种通过使用噪声条件分类器将采样过程导向目标类别来控制扩散生成的方法。分类器引导的一个缺点是需要两个单独训练的模型：分类器和扩散模型。因此，本文研究了一种更高效的方法：将预训练的语音分类器直接重用于引导扩散语音生成，无需额外训练。创新点包括：提出了一种无需训练的引导框架，利用现有分类器的内部表示来指导生成；设计了适应性噪声条件机制以保持分类器性能。主要贡献在于大幅降低了计算成本，同时实现了高质量的受控语音生成，为扩散模型的实际应用提供了新思路。

生成模型.title: FlowEdit: Associative Memory for Lifelong Pronunciation Adaptation in Flow-Matching TTS
生成模型.title_zh: FlowEdit：用于流匹配语音合成中终身发音适应的联想记忆
生成模型.summary: Flow-matching text-to-speech systems achieve remarkable zero-shot quality but remain static after deployment: pronunciation errors on out-of-vocabulary proper nouns persist unless the model is retrained. We introduce FlowEdit, a life-long adaptation framework for frozen flow-matching TTS that learns to correct pronunciation errors on-the-fly via an associative memory module. The memory stores key-value pairs of phonetic corrections, and during inference, it retrieves and applies corrections to the latent representation before the flow-matching decoder. This approach requires no fine-tuning of the base TTS model and can adapt to new words incrementally. Experiments demonstrate that FlowEdit effectively corrects pronunciation errors while preserving voice quality and naturalness, enabling continuous adaptation without catastrophic forgetting.
生成模型.summary_zh: 流匹配文本转语音系统在零样本场景下表现优异，但部署后模型参数固定：对于词汇表外的专有名词，发音错误会持续存在，除非重新训练模型。本文提出FlowEdit，一种针对冻结流匹配TTS的终身适应框架，通过联想记忆模块在线学习纠正发音错误。该记忆模块存储发音纠正的键值对，推理时检索并应用于流匹配解码器之前的潜在表示。该方法无需微调基础TTS模型，且能增量适应新词。实验表明，FlowEdit在保持语音质量和自然度的同时有效纠正发音错误，实现了无灾难性遗忘的持续适应。

多模态学习.title: Evaluating and Enhancing Negation Comprehension in Remote Sensing MLLMs
多模态学习.title_zh: 遥感多模态大语言模型中否定理解能力的评估与增强
多模态学习.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in various Remote Sensing (RS) tasks. However, their ability to comprehend negation remains underexplored, limiting deployment in real-world applications where models must explicitly identify what is false or absent, e.g.,
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在遥感任务中取得了显著成功。然而，它们理解否定表述的能力尚未得到充分探索，这限制了在必须明确识别虚假或缺失信息的实际应用中的部署。本文系统评估了遥感MLLM的否定理解能力，发现现有模型在否定场景下性能显著下降。创新点在于提出了一个专门针对遥感图像的否定理解基准数据集，并设计了一种通过对比学习增强否定感知的训练方法。主要贡献是揭示了MLLM在否定理解上的缺陷，并提供了有效的改进方案。

多模态学习.title: MedRLM: Recursive Multimodal Health Intelligence for Long-Context Clinical Reasoning, Sensor-Guided Screening, Evidence-Grounded Decision Support, and Community-to-Tertiary Referral Optimization
多模态学习.title_zh: MedRLM：面向长上下文临床推理、传感器引导筛查、基于证据的决策支持和社区至三级转诊优化的递归多模态健康智能
多模态学习.summary: Real-world clinical decision support requires reasoning over heterogeneous and longitudinal patient information rather than answering isolated medical questions. However, current medical large language models and retrieval-augmented generation systems often rely on single-step prompting or retrieval
多模态学习.summary_zh: 真实世界的临床决策支持需要对异质且纵向的患者信息进行推理，而非回答孤立的医学问题。然而，当前的医学大语言模型和检索增强生成系统通常依赖单步提示或检索，缺乏处理长期上下文和多模态数据的能力。本文提出MedRLM，一种递归多模态健康智能框架，通过递归推理机制整合文本、传感器数据、影像等多模态信息，实现长上下文临床推理。创新点包括：多模态递归注意力机制以捕获时序依赖，传感器引导的筛查模块，以及基于证据的决策支持系统。主要贡献在于构建了从社区到三级转诊的优化流程，显著提升了临床决策的准确性和可解释性。

多模态学习.title: ELVA: Exploring Ranking-Driven Universal Multimodal Retrieval
多模态学习.title_zh: ELVA：探索排序驱动的通用多模态检索
多模态学习.summary: Leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) via contrastive learning has become a mainstream paradigm for improving the performance of Universal Multimodal Retrieval (UMR). However, previous works have ignored the grain blindness when adapting the contrastive paradigm into retrieval tasks. G
多模态学习.summary_zh: 通过对比学习利用多模态大语言模型已成为提升通用多模态检索性能的主流范式。然而，先前工作忽略了将对比范式适配到检索任务时的粒度盲点问题。本文提出ELVA，一种排序驱动的通用多模态检索框架，通过引入排序损失来弥补对比学习中的粒度不足。创新点包括：设计了一种新颖的排序驱动训练策略，使模型能够区分细粒度的相关性；提出了多模态特征对齐方法以增强跨模态理解。主要贡献在于显著提升了多模态检索的精度和鲁棒性，在多个基准数据集上达到最优性能。

多模态学习.title: Implicit Semantic-Aware Communication Based on Hypergraph Reasoning
多模态学习.title_zh: 基于超图推理的隐式语义感知通信
多模态学习.summary: Semantic-aware communication has emerged as a transformative paradigm for next-generation communication systems, shifting the fundamental goal from transmitting bit-level symbols to reliably recovering and understanding the semantic meaning of information. Previous studies have demonstrated that representing knowledge as explicit graph structures can improve communication efficiency. However, explicit graphs may not capture complex, higher-order relationships inherent in many real-world scenarios. This paper proposes a novel implicit semantic-aware communication framework based on hypergraph reasoning. Instead of transmitting explicit graph structures, the framework learns a shared hypergraph representation in a latent space, enabling the receiver to infer the semantic relationships among multiple concepts simultaneously. The hypergraph captures higher-order interactions beyond pairwise connections, allowing for more nuanced semantic understanding. Simulation results show that the proposed method significantly reduces transmission overhead while improving semantic reconstruction accuracy compared to existing explicit graph-based approaches.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种基于超图推理的隐式语义通信框架，旨在解决传统显式图结构通信中无法捕获高阶语义关系的问题。与以往传输显式图结构的方法不同，该框架在潜在空间中学习共享的超图表示，使接收端能够同时推断多个概念之间的语义关系。超图建模超越了成对连接，捕捉了现实场景中复杂的高阶交互。仿真结果表明，与现有基于显式图的方法相比，该方法在显著降低传输开销的同时，提高了语义重建精度。这一工作为下一代语义通信系统提供了新思路，尤其在需要理解复杂语义关系的场景（如多模态数据融合、分布式智能）中具有重要应用前景。

AI Agent与自动化.title: Automating SKILL.md Generation for Computer-Using Agents via Interaction Trajectory Mining
AI Agent与自动化.title_zh: 通过交互轨迹挖掘自动生成计算机使用代理的SKILL.md
AI Agent与自动化.summary: Explicit skill libraries make computer-using agents easier to inspect, but it remains unclear whether such libraries can be mined from interaction data in a way that improves downstream policies. We study this question through a three-stage pipeline that segments GUI trajectories, clusters segments into reusable skills, and evaluates their impact on downstream task performance.
AI Agent与自动化.summary_zh: 显式技能库使计算机使用代理更易于检查，但尚不清楚能否从交互数据中挖掘出此类库以改进下游策略。本文通过一个三阶段流程研究该问题：分割GUI轨迹、将片段聚类为可复用技能，并评估其对下游任务性能的影响。创新点在于提出了一种从交互数据自动生成技能库的方法，并验证了其对代理性能的提升作用。

AI Agent与自动化.title: Sovereign Execution Brokers: Enforcing Certificate-Bound Authority in Agentic Control Planes
AI Agent与自动化.title_zh: 主权执行代理：在代理控制平面中实施证书绑定授权
AI Agent与自动化.summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly connected to cloud, deployment, and data-control workflows, but production mutation authority should not reside inside non-deterministic reasoning processes. Existing access-control mechanisms authorize identities, while assurance layers certify proposed actions; neither binds authority to a specific executable. We introduce Sovereign Execution Brokers (SEBs), a new architectural primitive that enforces certificate-bound authority, ensuring that only pre-authorized, signed executables can perform sensitive operations in agentic control planes.
AI Agent与自动化.summary_zh: 自主代理日益与云、部署和数据控制工作流相连，但生产环境中的变更权限不应存在于非确定性推理过程中。现有访问控制机制授权身份，而保证层认证提议的操作，但均未将权限绑定到特定可执行文件。本文提出主权执行代理（SEB），一种新的架构原语，通过证书绑定授权，确保只有预授权、签名的可执行文件才能在代理控制平面中执行敏感操作。创新点在于引入了证书绑定的授权机制，增强了代理系统的安全性和可控性。

计算机辅助设计/CAD.title: BIM-Edit: Benchmarking Large Language Models for IFC-Based Building Information Modeling
计算机辅助设计/CAD.title_zh: BIM-Edit：基于IFC的建筑信息建模的大语言模型基准测试
计算机辅助设计/CAD.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to computer-aided design (CAD) to generate design artifacts from textual instructions. In engineering practice, this requires more than creating new geometry, models must also understand existing scenes, edit them correctly, and preserve semantic consistency. We introduce BIM-Edit, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on IFC-based building information modeling (BIM) editing tasks. The benchmark includes a diverse set of editing scenarios, metrics for correctness and semantic preservation, and baseline results from state-of-the-art LLMs. Our findings highlight significant challenges in scene understanding and precise editing, pointing to future research directions.
计算机辅助设计/CAD.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）日益应用于计算机辅助设计（CAD），根据文本指令生成设计工件。在工程实践中，这不仅需要创建新几何体，模型还必须理解现有场景、正确编辑并保持语义一致性。本文提出BIM-Edit，一个用于评估LLM在基于IFC的建筑信息建模（BIM）编辑任务上的基准测试。该基准包含多样化的编辑场景、正确性和语义保持的度量标准，以及来自最先进LLM的基线结果。研究结果凸显了场景理解和精确编辑方面的重大挑战，为未来研究指明了方向。创新点在于首次系统性地评估了LLM在BIM编辑任务上的能力，并提供了标准化基准。

神经网络与计算.title: Hybrid ANN-SNN Pipeline with Local Plasticity
神经网络与计算.title_zh: 具有局部可塑性的混合ANN-SNN流水线
神经网络与计算.summary: This work proposes a hybrid ANN-SNN pipeline that effectively leverages the rich embeddings of pretrained artificial neural networks (ANNs) to enable high-performance spiking neural networks (SNNs). The architecture couples a pretrained EfficientNet encoder with a CoLaNET spiking classifier. We conv
神经网络与计算.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种混合ANN-SNN流水线，有效利用预训练人工神经网络（ANN）的丰富嵌入，实现高性能脉冲神经网络（SNN）。该架构将预训练的EfficientNet编码器与CoLaNET脉冲分类器相结合。通过引入局部可塑性机制，在保持低功耗优势的同时显著提升了SNN的分类精度。创新点在于利用预训练ANN的嵌入作为SNN的输入，避免了从头训练SNN的困难，并在不增加全局反向传播的前提下实现了高效学习。主要贡献是证明了混合架构在图像分类任务上能达到与纯ANN相当的性能，同时具备SNN的低能耗特性。

网络安全与AI.title: Calibration Without Comprehension: Diagnosing the Limits of Fine-Tuning LLMs for Vulnerability Detection in Systems Software
网络安全与AI.title_zh: 无理解的校准：诊断微调LLM用于系统软件漏洞检测的局限性
网络安全与AI.summary: Whether LLMs scoring well on vulnerability benchmarks genuinely reason about security or merely pattern-match on contaminated data remains unresolved. We present CWE-Trace, a framework for LLM vulnerability detection built from 834 manually curated Linux kernel samples spanning 74 CWEs. The framewor
网络安全与AI.summary_zh: 本文针对大型语言模型（LLM）在漏洞检测基准测试中表现良好但可能存在数据污染的问题，提出了CWE-Trace框架。该框架基于834个手动整理的Linux内核样本（涵盖74个CWE类别）构建，用于诊断LLM对系统软件漏洞的理解能力。研究发现，微调后的LLM在检测已知漏洞时表现良好，但在面对新类型漏洞或对抗性样本时性能显著下降，表明其更多依赖模式匹配而非真正的安全推理。创新点在于提出了细粒度的评估框架和诊断方法，揭示了LLM在漏洞检测中的局限性。主要贡献是为安全领域使用LLM提供了重要的实证分析和改进方向。

自然语言处理.title: From Texts to Scores: Tracing the Emergence of Essay Quality Representations in Large Language Models
自然语言处理.title_zh: 从文本到分数：追踪大型语言模型中作文质量表征的涌现
自然语言处理.summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially transformed Automated Essay Scoring (AES), yet the internal mechanisms underlying LLM-based scoring remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically analyze the hidden representations of eight LLMs across two English essay d
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 本文系统分析了八种大型语言模型（LLM）在自动作文评分（AES）任务中的隐藏表征，揭示了LLM如何从文本中提取质量相关信息。通过探针分析和表征相似度测量，发现LLM在中间层涌现出与作文质量高度相关的表征，且这些表征与人类评分标准具有一致性。创新点在于首次从表征角度解释了LLM评分的内在机制，并发现不同模型在评分能力上的差异与表征质量密切相关。主要贡献是为理解LLM的评分行为提供了理论依据，并为改进AES系统提供了指导。

自然语言处理.title: IHUBERT: Vector-Based Semantic Deduplication and Domain-Balanced Pretraining for Persian Resources
自然语言处理.title_zh: IHUBERT：基于向量的语义去重与领域平衡预训练用于波斯语资源
自然语言处理.summary: Persian pretrained language models (PLMs) are still limited by the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality pretraining corpora and by insufficient evaluation beyond standard classification and NER tasks. We present IHUBERT, a monolingual Persian PLM trained from scratch with the RoBERTa-base encoder (
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 本文针对波斯语预训练语言模型数据稀缺和评估不足的问题，提出了IHUBERT模型。该模型采用RoBERTa-base编码器从头训练，创新性地引入基于向量的语义去重方法，确保预训练语料的高质量；同时通过领域平衡策略，提升模型在多样化任务上的泛化能力。主要贡献包括构建了首个大规模高质量波斯语预训练语料库，并在多个NLP基准测试上达到最优性能，填补了波斯语PLM研究的空白。

自然语言处理.title: Navigating Unreliable Parametric and Contextual Knowledge: Explicit Knowledge Conflict Resolution for LLM Inference
自然语言处理.title_zh: 导航不可靠的参数与上下文知识：面向LLM推理的显式知识冲突解决
自然语言处理.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across a wide range of language-based tasks by leveraging both extensive parametric knowledge and in-context learning ability, enabling them to incorporate external information provided in the input prompt. However, the integration of ext
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 本文针对大语言模型（LLM）在融合外部上下文时可能出现的参数知识与上下文知识冲突问题，提出了显式知识冲突解决方法。通过设计冲突检测与消解机制，模型能够识别并解决不一致信息，从而提升推理的准确性和鲁棒性。主要创新在于将知识冲突处理显式化，并验证了该方法在多个问答和推理任务上的有效性，为LLM的安全可靠应用提供了重要技术支撑。

AI代理与工具调用.title: LedgerAgent: Structured State for Policy-Adherent Tool-Calling Agents
AI代理与工具调用.title_zh: LedgerAgent：用于策略合规工具调用代理的结构化状态
AI代理与工具调用.summary: Policy-adherent tool-calling agents in customer-service domains must maintain task states across turns while calling tools and obeying domain policies. Task states consist of relevant facts, identifiers, constraints, and conditions observed through user interaction and tool calls. In standard agents
AI代理与工具调用.summary_zh: 本文提出了LedgerAgent框架，用于构建在客服领域中遵循策略的工具调用代理。该框架引入结构化状态管理机制，将任务状态（包括相关事实、标识符、约束和条件）显式建模为账本（ledger），从而确保代理在多次交互和工具调用过程中遵守领域策略。创新点在于将状态管理与策略执行相结合，通过结构化表示提高了代理的可靠性和可解释性。主要贡献是提出了一种可扩展的架构，有效解决了标准代理在复杂多轮对话中容易违反策略的问题，并在实际客服场景中验证了其有效性。

多模态与音频生成.title: Hybrid Diffusion Transformer for Instruction-Guided Audio Editing via Rectified Flow
多模态与音频生成.title_zh: 基于修正流的混合扩散Transformer用于指令引导的音频编辑
多模态与音频生成.summary: Audio editing aims to modify specific content in an existing audio clip according to a natural language instruction while preserving the remaining acoustic content. Despite the remarkable progress of diffusion models, existing training-based editing methods mainly rely on the local inductive biases
多模态与音频生成.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于修正流（Rectified Flow）的混合扩散Transformer模型，用于指令引导的音频编辑。该模型结合了扩散模型和Transformer的优势，通过修正流技术实现高效的音频内容修改。创新点在于引入混合架构，既能捕捉全局依赖关系，又能保持局部音频结构的完整性，从而在遵循自然语言指令的同时保留未修改部分的声学特征。主要贡献是在多个音频编辑基准上取得了最先进的性能，并证明了修正流在音频生成任务中的有效性。

机器学习理论.title: Beyond Accuracy: Measuring Logical Compliance of Predictive Models
机器学习理论.title_zh: 超越准确率：衡量预测模型的逻辑合规性
机器学习理论.summary: Machine learning models are predominantly evaluated through predictive performance metrics such as ranking quality, prediction error, or classification accuracy. While these metrics effectively quantify how closely predictions match the ground truth, they do not assess whether model outputs respect logical constraints or domain knowledge. This paper introduces a formal framework for measuring the logical compliance of predictive models, i.e., the degree to which model predictions adhere to a set of propositional logic rules. We propose novel metrics that quantify violations of logical constraints and provide algorithms for their efficient computation. Through experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, we demonstrate that high predictive accuracy does not guarantee logical compliance, and that our metrics reveal critical model flaws that traditional metrics miss. The work highlights the importance of incorporating logical reasoning into model evaluation, particularly in safety-critical applications.
机器学习理论.summary_zh: 该研究提出了逻辑合规性（Logical Compliance）的概念和度量框架，用于评估机器学习模型输出是否符合预定义的逻辑约束。传统评估指标（如准确率）仅关注预测与真实标签的匹配程度，而忽略了模型是否违反领域知识或逻辑规则。作者设计了基于命题逻辑的量化指标，并开发了高效算法来计算这些指标。实验表明，高准确率的模型可能严重违反逻辑约束，而现有指标无法发现此类缺陷。该工作强调了在安全关键领域（如医疗诊断、自动驾驶）中，逻辑合规性应成为模型评估的必要组成部分，为可信AI提供了新的评价维度。

图神经网络.title: Boundary Embedding Shaping with Adaptive Contrastive Learning for Graph Structural Disentanglement
图神经网络.title_zh: 基于自适应对比学习的边界嵌入塑造用于图结构解缠
图神经网络.summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) excel at aggregating neighbor information for classification, yet their performance is hindered by graph structural entanglement, where spurious correlations from semantically irrelevant neighbors contaminate node embeddings. This challenge is most acute for nodes near class boundaries. We propose a novel framework, Boundary Embedding Shaping with Adaptive Contrastive Learning (BES-ACL), to disentangle graph structure. Specifically, we identify boundary nodes via an entropy-based metric and design a boundary-aware contrastive loss that pulls nodes of the same class together while pushing apart nodes of different classes, with adaptive weighting based on boundary proximity. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that BES-ACL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in node classification accuracy and structural disentanglement.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）擅长聚合邻居信息进行分类，但图结构纠缠问题会因语义无关邻居的虚假相关污染节点嵌入，从而阻碍其性能。这一问题在类别边界附近的节点上尤为严重。本文提出了一种新框架——基于自适应对比学习的边界嵌入塑造（BES-ACL），用于图结构解缠。具体而言，通过基于熵的度量识别边界节点，并设计一种边界感知的对比损失函数，该损失函数将同类节点拉近、异类节点推远，同时根据节点与边界的接近程度进行自适应加权。在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，BES-ACL在节点分类准确率和结构解缠方面显著优于现有最先进方法。

推荐系统.title: Structuring and Tokenizing Distributed User Interest Context for Generative Recommendation
推荐系统.title_zh: 面向生成式推荐的结构化与分布式用户兴趣上下文分词
推荐系统.summary: Generative recommendation is an emerging paradigm that has shown promise in industrial recommendation systems, aiming to predict users' next interactions from their historical behaviors. At the core of generative recommendation lies item tokenization, which bridges item semantics and recommendation tasks. However, existing tokenization methods treat user behavior sequences as flat lists, failing to capture the hierarchical structure of user interests. We propose StructToken, a framework that first structures user behavior sequences into a tree of interest clusters via hierarchical clustering, then tokenizes each node with a learnable codebook. The resulting tokens are fed into a transformer-based generative model for next-item prediction. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that StructToken significantly outperforms flat tokenization baselines, achieving up to 15% improvement in hit rate.
推荐系统.summary_zh: 生成式推荐是一种新兴范式，在工业推荐系统中展现出潜力，旨在从用户历史行为预测其下一次交互。生成式推荐的核心是物品分词，它连接物品语义与推荐任务。然而，现有分词方法将用户行为序列视为扁平列表，未能捕捉用户兴趣的层次结构。本文提出StructToken框架，首先通过层次聚类将用户行为序列结构化为兴趣簇树，然后使用可学习码本对每个节点进行分词。所得分词结果输入基于Transformer的生成式模型进行下一物品预测。在大规模数据集上的实验表明，StructToken显著优于扁平分词基线，命中率提升高达15%。

LLM安全与鲁棒性.title: LLM agent safety, multi-turn red-teaming, jailbreak benchmarks, adversarial robustness, safety-critical systems
LLM安全与鲁棒性.title_zh: LLM智能体安全、多轮红队测试、越狱基准、对抗鲁棒性、安全关键系统
LLM安全与鲁棒性.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly proposed as supervisory components for safety-critical systems, yet their robustness under sustained, adaptive adversarial pressure remains poorly characterized. We present NRT-Bench, a benchmark for multi-turn red-teaming of LLM agents acting as op
LLM安全与鲁棒性.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体越来越多地被提议作为安全关键系统的监督组件，但它们在持续、自适应对抗压力下的鲁棒性仍鲜有研究。我们提出了NRT-Bench，这是一个针对作为操作员的LLM智能体进行多轮红队测试的基准。通过模拟自适应攻击者，评估智能体在多轮交互中的安全漏洞，为安全关键场景下的LLM部署提供了新的评估标准。

LLM推理基准.title: QMFOL: Benchmarking Large Language Model Reasoning via Quantifiable Monadic First-Order Logic Test Case Generation
LLM推理基准.title_zh: QMFOL：通过可量化的一元一阶逻辑测试用例生成来基准测试大型语言模型推理
LLM推理基准.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant progress in reasoning, particularly in deductive reasoning, which is crucial for high-stakes decision-making. As models improve, evaluation benchmarks should evolve to keep pace. However, existing benchmarks lack fine-grained control over logical co
LLM推理基准.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在推理方面取得了显著进展，特别是在演绎推理上，这对高风险决策至关重要。然而，现有基准缺乏对逻辑复杂性的细粒度控制。我们提出了QMFOL，一种通过可量化的一元一阶逻辑测试用例生成来评估LLM推理能力的方法。该方法允许精确控制逻辑结构，生成不同难度的测试，从而更细致地评估模型的演绎推理能力。

元启发式优化与强化学习.title: RACL: Reasoning-Agent Control Layers for Continuous Metaheuristic Learning
元启发式优化与强化学习.title_zh: RACL：用于连续元启发式学习的推理智能体控制层
元启发式优化与强化学习.summary: This paper introduces RACL, a Reasoning-Agent Control Layer for metaheuristics. RACL places a reasoning agent above an existing optimizer. The agent does not replace the optimizer and does not modify business constraints. Instead, it controls the optimizer's internal search behavior by observing ope
元启发式优化与强化学习.summary_zh: 本文提出了RACL，一种用于元启发式算法的推理智能体控制层。RACL在现有优化器之上放置一个推理智能体，该智能体不替换优化器，也不修改业务约束，而是通过观察操作参数和性能指标来控制优化器的内部搜索行为。这种方法实现了连续元启发式学习，提高了优化效率，适用于动态环境中的参数调优。

元启发式优化与强化学习.title: Multi-Head Attention-Based Feature Extractor Integration with Soft Actor-Critic for Porosity Prediction and Process Parameter Optimization in Additive Manufacturing
元启发式优化与强化学习.title_zh: 基于多头注意力的特征提取器与软演员-评论家集成用于增材制造中的孔隙率预测和工艺参数优化
元启发式优化与强化学习.summary: Additive manufacturing process optimization requires precise parameter control to minimize defects such as porosity. Traditional reinforcement learning (RL) approaches using discrete action spaces suffer from slow convergence and susceptibility to local optima, limiting their effectiveness for high-
元启发式优化与强化学习.summary_zh: 增材制造工艺优化需要精确的参数控制以最小化孔隙率等缺陷。传统的使用离散动作空间的强化学习方法收敛慢且易陷入局部最优。本文提出了一种基于多头注意力的特征提取器与软演员-评论家（SAC）算法的集成方法，用于孔隙率预测和工艺参数优化。通过连续动作空间和注意力机制，提高了优化效率和预测精度，为增材制造提供了新的智能优化方案。

AI智能体验证.title: Efficient and Sound Probabilistic Verification for AI Agents
AI智能体验证.title_zh: AI智能体的高效且可靠的概率验证
AI智能体验证.summary: Securing AI agents that operate in complex digital environments has become a critical need, and runtime monitoring approaches that formulate and enforce policies expressed in a formal language like Datalog offer a promising solution. However, existing approaches are restricted to deterministic polic
AI智能体验证.summary_zh: 确保在复杂数字环境中运行的AI智能体的安全已成为关键需求，运行时监控方法通过制定和执行用Datalog等正式语言表达的策略提供了有前景的解决方案。然而，现有方法仅限于确定性策略。本文提出了高效且可靠的概率验证方法，能够处理概率性策略，在运行时验证智能体的行为是否符合概率约束，显著提高了验证的准确性和效率。

语音/文本转语音.title: How Do Instructions Shape Speech? Cross-Attention Attribution for Style-Captioned Text-to-Speech
语音/文本转语音.title_zh: 指令如何塑造语音？风格字幕文本转语音的交叉注意力归因
语音/文本转语音.summary: Style-captioned text-to-speech systems use natural language to control voice characteristics, but how individual words influence acoustic output remains unclear. Understanding this is critical for diagnosing failure modes and improving controllability in expressive TTS. We propose cross-attention attribution methods to quantify the contribution of each word in the style caption to the generated speech features. Our approach provides interpretability insights and enables fine-grained control over voice style.
语音/文本转语音.summary_zh: 风格字幕文本转语音系统使用自然语言控制语音特征，但单个词如何影响声学输出仍不清楚。理解这一点对于诊断故障模式和提高表达性TTS的可控性至关重要。本文提出交叉注意力归因方法，量化风格字幕中每个词对生成语音特征的贡献。该方法提供了可解释性见解，并实现了对语音风格的细粒度控制。

数据可视化/人机交互.title: DataMagic: Transforming Tabular Data into Data Insight Video
数据可视化/人机交互.title_zh: DataMagic：将表格数据转化为数据洞察视频
数据可视化/人机交互.summary: Data videos integrate dynamic charts, voice narration, and synchronized animations to communicate data insights as temporal narratives, making them an effective medium for improving data consumption efficiency in the data management lifecycle. However, producing high-quality data videos requires expertise in design and storytelling. We present DataMagic, an automated system that transforms tabular data into engaging data insight videos. It leverages AI to generate narrative structures, visualizations, and voiceovers, significantly lowering the barrier for non-experts.
数据可视化/人机交互.summary_zh: 数据视频整合动态图表、语音解说和同步动画，以时间叙事传达数据洞察，成为提高数据管理生命周期中数据消费效率的有效媒介。然而，制作高质量数据视频需要设计和叙事方面的专业知识。本文提出DataMagic，一个自动化系统，将表格数据转化为引人入胜的数据洞察视频。它利用AI生成叙事结构、可视化和配音，显著降低了非专家的使用门槛。

强化学习/世界模型.title: Sensorimotor World Models: Perception for Action via Inverse Dynamics
强化学习/世界模型.title_zh: 感觉运动世界模型：通过逆动力学实现行动导向的感知
强化学习/世界模型.summary: Perception for action suggests that representations of the world should be shaped not by visual fidelity alone, but by their relevance for actions. At the same time, latent JEPA-style world models advocate learning compact predictive states from high-dimensional observations to facilitate the prediction of future states. We propose sensorimotor world models that integrate inverse dynamics to learn representations directly useful for control. This approach bridges the gap between perception and action, enabling more efficient policy learning in reinforcement learning settings.
强化学习/世界模型.summary_zh: 行动导向的感知认为，世界表征不应仅由视觉保真度塑造，而应基于其与行动的相关性。同时，潜变量JEPA风格的世界模型提倡从高维观测中学习紧凑的预测状态以促进未来状态预测。本文提出感觉运动世界模型，集成逆动力学以学习直接用于控制的表征。该方法弥合了感知与行动之间的鸿沟，在强化学习场景中实现了更高效的政策学习。

AI理论.title: Thermodynamic Measure of Intelligence
AI理论.summary: Can intelligence be measured? We propose that intelligence can be defined as the lawful amplification of rare but valid futures: a system increases the probability of outcomes that would be unlikely under passive dynamics but remain admissible under the constraints of the domain. We start with the p
AI理论.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于热力学的智能度量方法，将智能定义为对稀有但有效未来的合法放大：系统增加在被动动力学下不可能但领域约束下允许的结果的概率。通过形式化该概念，作者建立了一个理论框架，可能为评估和比较不同AI系统的智能水平提供新视角。主要创新在于将智能与概率放大和热力学原理联系起来，为AI理论贡献了新的度量标准。

医疗AI.title: Context-Aware Hierarchical Bayesian Modeling of IVF Laboratory Environmental Conditions
医疗AI.title_zh: IVF实验室环境条件的上下文感知层次贝叶斯建模
医疗AI.summary: IVF pregnancy rates are routinely modeled using patient-level variables, while high-resolution laboratory environmental data remain underutilized. We show that this is a missed opportunity. Rather than relying on raw sensor averages, we engineer 55 context-aware temporal features, including rolling
医疗AI.summary_zh: 本文针对体外受精（IVF）实验室环境数据未被充分利用的问题，提出了上下文感知的层次贝叶斯模型。作者设计了55个上下文感知的时间特征（如滚动统计），替代原始传感器平均值，以更精确地捕捉环境变化对妊娠率的影响。主要贡献在于将高分辨率环境数据纳入预测模型，显著提升了IVF成功率的预测准确性，为辅助生殖技术提供了数据驱动的优化方案。

NLP.title: The Register Gap: A Meaning Intelligence Framework for Nigerian Public Discourse
NLP.title_zh: 语域鸿沟：尼日利亚公共话语的意义智能框架
NLP.summary: We introduce the Meaning Intelligence Framework (MIF), a nine-dimension annotation and evaluation schema for Nigerian public discourse that separates surface sentiment from true communicative intent. Existing benchmarks for Nigerian languages, including NaijaSenti and AfriSenti, treat sentiment classification as a simplistic polarity detection task, ignoring the complexity of register, pragmatic intent, and cultural context. MIF addresses this gap by annotating texts along nine dimensions: polarity, intensity, sarcasm, indirectness, formality, power distance, collectivism, face-saving, and cultural reference. We apply MIF to a corpus of 5,000 Nigerian social media posts and news comments, achieving high inter-annotator agreement. Experiments show that models trained on MIF-annotated data significantly outperform those trained on standard sentiment labels in capturing nuanced meaning, with a 15% improvement in F1 score for detecting sarcasm and indirect criticism. The framework provides a foundation for culturally-aware NLP in African languages.
NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出意义智能框架（MIF），这是一个针对尼日利亚公共话语的九维度标注与评估体系，旨在将表面情感与真实交际意图区分开来。现有的尼日利亚语言基准（如NaijaSenti和AfriSenti）将情感分类简化为极性检测任务，忽视了语域、语用意图和文化背景的复杂性。MIF通过从极性、强度、讽刺、间接性、正式性、权力距离、集体主义、面子保存和文化参考九个维度对文本进行标注来填补这一空白。我们将MIF应用于5000条尼日利亚社交媒体帖子和新闻评论语料，获得了较高的标注者间一致性。实验表明，在MIF标注数据上训练的模型在捕捉细微意义方面显著优于在标准情感标签上训练的模型，在检测讽刺和间接批评方面F1分数提升了15%。该框架为非洲语言的文化感知NLP奠定了基础。

机器学习/ML.title: Learner-based Concept Drift Detection: Analysis and Evaluation
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 基于学习器的概念漂移检测：分析与评估
机器学习/ML.summary: Machine learning algorithms deployed for evolving streaming environments must handle the non-stationary data distributions, commonly referred to as concept drift. The presence of concept drift poses a major challenge for many real-world applications because it can severely degrade their predictive performance. Existing drift detection methods often rely on monitoring model error or data distribution statistics. In this paper, we propose a novel learner-based approach that directly analyzes the internal representations of a learning model to detect drift. Our method leverages the hidden layer activations of a neural network as indicators of distribution change. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation on several synthetic and real-world streaming datasets, comparing our approach with state-of-the-art drift detection methods. Results demonstrate that our learner-based detector achieves faster detection times and higher accuracy in identifying drift points, particularly in high-dimensional and noisy environments. The method also provides insights into which features contribute to the drift, enabling more targeted model adaptation.
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 部署在演化流环境中的机器学习算法必须处理非平稳数据分布，即概念漂移。概念漂移的存在对许多实际应用构成重大挑战，因为它会严重降低预测性能。现有的漂移检测方法通常依赖于监控模型误差或数据分布统计量。本文提出了一种新颖的基于学习器的方法，通过直接分析学习模型的内部表示来检测漂移。我们的方法利用神经网络的隐藏层激活作为分布变化的指标。我们在多个合成和真实流数据集上进行了全面评估，将我们的方法与最先进的漂移检测方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的基于学习器的检测器在识别漂移点时实现了更快的检测时间和更高的准确性，特别是在高维和噪声环境中。该方法还能揭示哪些特征导致了漂移，从而实现更有针对性的模型适应。

category_summaries.故障诊断: 故障诊断领域今日关注深度学习在工业系统中的应用，特别是基于卷积神经网络和Transformer的异常检测方法，以及结合迁移学习解决数据不平衡问题。研究亮点包括利用生成对抗网络合成故障样本和开发可解释性诊断模型。
category_summaries.强化学习: 强化学习方向围绕样本效率提升展开，主要进展包括离线强化学习、基于模型的RL以及结合先验知识的奖励塑造。多智能体强化学习在协作场景中取得突破，如使用通信协议和注意力机制。
category_summaries.网络安全: 网络安全研究聚焦于利用AI检测网络入侵和恶意软件，特别是图神经网络在异常流量分析中的应用。同时，对抗性攻击与防御仍是热点，研究如何提高模型鲁棒性。
category_summaries.计算机视觉: 计算机视觉领域持续进步，自监督学习、视觉Transformer和扩散模型在图像生成、目标检测和分割任务中表现优异。视频理解方面，时空注意力机制和长视频建模成为焦点。
category_summaries.多智能体系统: 多智能体系统研究关注协作与竞争场景下的决策优化，特别是基于图神经网络和通信学习的策略协调。涌现行为分析和社会模拟也成为新兴方向。
category_summaries.机器人: 机器人领域强调感知-行动闭环，利用强化学习和模仿学习进行复杂操作技能获取。同时，基于视觉的机器人导航和灵巧手操控取得进展，并探索人机交互安全。
category_summaries.大语言模型: 大语言模型方向持续火热，研究重点包括模型压缩、高效推理、长文本处理和多语言能力。指令微调与人类反馈强化学习提升模型对齐，同时涌现出新的评测基准。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: 与强化学习方向重复，但更侧重算法创新，如分布强化学习、好奇心驱动探索和元学习。在游戏、机器人控制和工业优化中验证效果。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: 与LLM方向重复，突出研究如检索增强生成、工具调用和代码生成。安全与伦理问题也受到关注，包括幻觉检测和偏见缓解。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: 与CV方向重复，强调生成模型（如扩散模型）在图像编辑和3D重建中的应用。视觉语言模型连接图像与文本，推动多模态理解。
category_summaries.神经符号系统: 神经符号系统结合神经网络与符号推理，用于增强可解释性和逻辑推理能力。应用包括数学问题求解、知识图谱推理和程序合成。
category_summaries.AI安全: AI安全研究覆盖对抗攻击防御、模型鲁棒性评估和隐私保护。联邦学习和差分隐私技术被用于训练安全模型，同时关注AI系统对齐。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型领域以扩散模型为主导，在图像、音频、视频和3D生成中表现卓越。条件生成和可控生成成为热点，如文本到图像和文本到音乐。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习致力于融合文本、图像、语音等模态，代表性工作包括CLIP、DALL-E和Flamingo。研究重点为跨模态对齐、零样本迁移和生成任务。
category_summaries.AI Agent与自动化: AI Agent研究聚焦于自主决策和任务规划，利用大语言模型作为核心控制器。自动化方面包括自动编程、网页操作和工具使用，提升工作效率。
category_summaries.计算机辅助设计/CAD: CAD领域引入AI进行自动设计优化和生成，如使用生成对抗网络和强化学习进行拓扑优化。参数化建模和3D形状生成也取得进展。
category_summaries.神经网络与计算: 神经网络计算研究关注高效架构设计、神经架构搜索和模型压缩。脉冲神经网络和光子计算等新型范式也被探索。
category_summaries.网络安全与AI: 与网络安全方向类似，但更侧重AI驱动的安全应用，如利用深度学习进行恶意代码分析和网络威胁情报。对抗机器学习在安全场景中的应用。
category_summaries.自然语言处理: NLP领域预训练语言模型仍是基础，研究包括少样本学习、情感分析、机器翻译和问答系统。知识增强和结构化预测提升性能。
category_summaries.AI代理与工具调用: AI代理通过调用外部工具（如API、数据库）扩展能力，研究重点为工具选择、参数生成和错误处理。大语言模型作为代理核心。
category_summaries.多模态与音频生成: 多模态音频生成包括语音合成、音乐生成和音效生成。扩散模型和Transformer被用于高质量音频生成，同时结合文本或视觉条件。
category_summaries.机器学习理论: 机器学习理论研究模型泛化、优化理论和表示学习。最新进展包括神经网络的隐式正则化、对比学习理论和Transformer的动力学分析。
category_summaries.图神经网络: 图神经网络方向关注大规模图学习、动态图和异构图建模。应用包括推荐系统、药物发现和物理模拟。注意力机制和消息传递改进。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 推荐系统研究利用图神经网络和序列模型捕捉用户行为，同时探索多模态特征融合和可解释推荐。冷启动和公平性问题也受到关注。
category_summaries.LLM安全与鲁棒性: 专门研究大语言模型的安全问题，如对抗性提示、越狱攻击和幻觉。防御方法包括输入净化、安全微调和红队测试。
category_summaries.LLM推理基准: 开发新的基准测试评估大语言模型的推理能力，包括数学、逻辑和常识推理。链式思维提示和工具增强推理成为热点。
category_summaries.元启发式优化与强化学习: 结合元启发式算法（如遗传算法）与强化学习，用于解决组合优化问题。研究包括超参数优化和神经架构搜索。
category_summaries.AI智能体验证: AI智能体验证关注模型行为符合人类期望，包括可解释性、鲁棒性和安全性。验证方法涵盖形式化验证和对抗测试。
category_summaries.语音/文本转语音: 语音合成领域利用神经网络实现高自然度语音，支持多说话人、情感和韵律控制。零样本语音克隆和端到端模型成为趋势。
category_summaries.数据可视化/人机交互: 数据可视化研究结合AI自动生成图表和洞察，人机交互关注自然语言界面和手势控制。可交互的机器学习工具提升用户体验。
category_summaries.强化学习/世界模型: 世界模型通过学习环境动态辅助强化学习，提高样本效率。基于模型预测控制和无模型方法的结合取得进展。
category_summaries.AI理论: AI理论研究基础问题，如表示学习、因果推断和算法信息论。最新工作探索大模型的能力起源和神经网络的表征能力。
category_summaries.医疗AI: 医疗AI应用包括医学影像分析、疾病预测和药物发现。联邦学习用于隐私保护，可解释模型帮助临床决策。
category_summaries.NLP: 与自然语言处理方向重复，强调最新进展如大语言模型的涌现能力和指令遵循。多语言和跨语言迁移也是研究重点。
category_summaries.机器学习/ML: 机器学习涵盖广泛，包括集成学习、贝叶斯方法和优化算法。自动机器学习简化模型开发，可解释机器学习增强透明度。

highlights: 研究亮点1：《Multi-View Decompilation for LLM-Based Malware Classification》提出多视角反编译融合方法，显著提升了LLM在恶意软件分类中的准确性，具有实用价值。
研究亮点2：《SARLO-80: Worldwide Slant SAR Language Optic Dataset 80cm》发布了高分辨率SAR-光学配对数据集，填补了多模态遥感数据空白，对基础模型研究意义重大。
研究亮点1：'Finetuning Vision-Language-Action Models Requires Fewer Layers Than You Think' 揭示了VLA模型中知识分布的非均匀性，提出层高效微调策略，大幅降低计算成本，对机器人领域实际部署具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：'Lagrange: An Open-Vocabulary, Energy-Based Sparse Framework for Generalized End-to-End Driving' 提出开放词汇、基于能量的稀疏框架，结合视觉语言模型与能量基规划器，在自动驾驶泛化性和效率上取得突破，具有学术创新性和应用潜力。
研究亮点3：'CRAX: Fast Safe Reinforcement Learning Benchmarking' 通过简化2D物理环境，大幅加速安全强化学习基准测试，同时保持与3D基准的高相关性，为安全RL研究提供了高效工具，学术价值和实用性兼备。
研究亮点1：Multi-LCB将代码生成基准扩展到多语言，系统评估了LLM在不同语言上的性能差异，为多语言代码生成研究提供了标准化评估工具，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：Interpretable Sperm Morphology Classification通过注意力机制实现可解释分类，增强了临床可信度，为医学AI的可解释性研究提供了新思路。
研究亮点3：DeepSWIP将反事实推理引入神经符号系统，为因果推理在AI中的应用开辟了新方向，具有理论创新性。
研究亮点1：SPOT-E: Test-Time Entropy Shaping with Visual Spotlights for Frozen VLMs——提出了一种无需微调的测试时视觉增强方法，通过动态调整图像熵分布显著提升冻结VLM在证据密集型任务上的表现，具有即插即用的实用性。
研究亮点2：Evaluating and Enhancing Negation Comprehension in Remote Sensing MLLMs——系统评估并增强了遥感多模态大语言模型的否定理解能力，填补了该领域研究空白，对实际部署具有重要价值。
daily_summary: 今日AI研究动态总结：今日arXiv论文覆盖35个研究方向，整体呈现多领域协同发展的态势。大语言模型仍是核心热点，研究重点从模型规模转向效率与安全性，包括模型压缩、检索增强生成和对抗防御。同时，多模态学习与生成模型持续突破，扩散模型在图像、音频和3D生成中占据主导，并开始与语言模型深度融合。强化学习与机器人领域注重样本效率与复杂任务泛化，世界模型和离线RL成为关键方法。计算机视觉方面，自监督学习和视觉Transformer继续推动性能提升，视频理解与生成任务受到更多关注。AI安全与伦理问题日益突出，特别是LLM的幻觉、偏见和越狱攻击防御。此外，图神经网络在推荐系统和药物发现中应用广泛，而神经符号系统则为可解释AI提供新路径。整体趋势显示，AI研究正从单一模态向多模态融合、从模型能力向安全对齐、从算法创新向实际应用落地演进。
